title: Three groups, one missing axis
subtitle: Jaya's piece compares pattern library and tool fluency as if they're rival assets. They aren't. The interesting group has both.
caption: Where decision-makers actually sit on AI in 2026.

tl.label: The CIO
tl.description: Deep experience, no access to the new medium. Defends with 'judgment and taste.'

tr.label: The third group
tr.description: Pattern library plus tool fluency. Multiplicative, not additive. Quietly running away with everything.

bl.label: Sidelined
bl.description: Few priors, no fluency. Not in the conversation yet.

br.label: The 22-year-old
br.description: Speed and zero calcified priors. Rebuilding pattern recognition from the ground up.
